description:
Goal
Rename the typed module-function-arity identity type from ExportKey to Mfa so the codebase uses the shorter, domain-accurate name consistently at module/interface/link boundaries.

Signal
- The former ExportKey type and references are renamed to Mfa across production code, tests, and docs.
- Module/interface/link code still reads clearly at the boundary between typed identities and dotted renderings.
- Formatting, clippy, and targeted module/compiler/codegen tests pass.

Strategy
1. Rename the type and its constructor/usages at the identity layer.
2. Propagate the rename through interfaces, module graph/loading, linker code, tests, and docs.
3. Run the targeted verification matrix to catch any semantic fallout from the broad rename.

References
- src/modules/identity.rs
- src/modules/interface.rs
- src/ir_codegen/compiled.rs
- .agent/docs/modules.md
title: Rename ExportKey to Mfa
